name: keyword_only_ai_ticker_rejected
expected: Keyword-only theme language is capped and rejected by T1.

name: same_sector_wrong_mechanism_rejected
expected: Same-sector-only companies cannot clear exposure purity.

name: direct_beneficiary_validated
expected: A direct beneficiary with validated fundamentals and clean market/risk states clears T8 research justification.

name: seed_etf_only_cannot_pass_exposure
expected: Seed ETF membership alone is not enough to pass T1.

name: leader_but_extended
expected: High-quality but extended leaders remain watchlisted as leader-but-extended.

name: delayed_catchup_candidate
expected: Validated exposure/fundamentals with improving price from behind becomes delayed catch-up.

name: severe_dilution_no_trade
expected: Severe dilution overrides otherwise strong states and returns no-trade.

name: illiquid_microcap_speculative_only
expected: Illiquid microcap evidence creates an illiquidity veto.

name: theme_high_reality_no_clean_expression
expected: Strong theme reality cannot rescue the wrong ticker.

name: theme_high_reality_all_extended
expected: Extended leaders are not upgraded to cleaner expression just because theme reality is high.

name: stale_price_no_alert
expected: Stale price bars produce insufficient price state, not a price leadership event.

name: vendor_disagreement_warning
expected: Material SEC/FMP disagreement caps fundamentals and emits a reconciliation warning.

name: manual_seed_not_investable_until_gates_pass
expected: Manual seed mappings remain review-only until provider-backed gates pass.

name: price_only_false_alert
expected: A price-only setup with weak exposure/fundamentals cannot produce a clean expression.

name: missing_critical_data
expected: Missing required signal layers produces insufficient data.

name: no_clean_public_equity_expression
expected: High dispersion with proven theme reality prefers basket or ETF over forced single-name output.
